name: Chuck Wagon Goulash
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef lightly in oil; add onion and celery and cook until onion is yellow and celery is soft.
2. Add beans, tomatoes, cilantro, jalapeno's and spaghetti and seasoning; place in a 9 1/2 x 13-inch casserole.
3. Bake at 350°F until hot and bubbly.
4. Grated cheese may be put on top last 15 minutes of baking.
